name: Pillar3 - Workflow 2 - Campaign Ops Pipeline (Agnostic v2)

parameters.query: ={{"SELECT workspace_id, banned_phrases, max_budget, updated_at FROM brand_memory WHERE workspace_id = '" + String($node['W2 Validate Payload'].json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "' LIMIT 1;"}}

={{"INSERT INTO campaigns (id, workspace_id, status, strategy_json, review_notes_json, updated_at) VALUES ('" + String($json.campaign_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'approved', '" + JSON.stringify($json.strategy || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'approved', strategy_json = EXCLUDED.strategy_json, review_notes_json = '[]'::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id AS campaign_id, workspace_id, status;"}}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { campaign_id: $json.campaign_id, workspace_id: $json.workspace_id, solutions_count: ($node['W2 Budget Verify'].json.solutions || []).length, status: 'approved', ts: new Date().toISOString() } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { campaign_id: $node['W2 Update Campaign Approved'].json.campaign_id, workspace_id: $node['W2 Update Campaign Approved'].json.workspace_id, status: 'approved', message: 'Campaign passed safety and budget checks' } }}

parameters.query: ={{"INSERT INTO campaigns (id, workspace_id, status, strategy_json, review_notes_json, updated_at) VALUES ('" + String($json.campaign_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'rejected', '" + JSON.stringify($json.strategy || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, '" + JSON.stringify($json.rejection_issues || $json.flagged_issues || []).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'rejected', strategy_json = EXCLUDED.strategy_json, review_notes_json = EXCLUDED.review_notes_json, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id AS campaign_id, workspace_id, status, review_notes_json;"}}
